subcodes.first_line: The sorrows have seized, O my God, the dwellers of Thy Kingdom and Thy Dominion by reason of that which the hands of those who have joined partners with Thee have wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذت الاحزان یا الهی سکان ملکوتک و جبروتک بما اکتسبت ایادی الذین اشرکوا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for protection, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
